context.description: the code elements to compare, filled into the prompt body

question.description: the appropriateness criterion, filled into 'Which might be more appropriate for {{question}}'

additionalInstructions.description: declared for the union of double-brace tokens present in the shared payload file; not filled by the comparison builder

conversationHistory.description: declared for the union of double-brace tokens present in the shared payload file; not filled by the comparison builder

checks: analysis covers similarities/differences, use cases, quality metrics, and an appropriateness recommendation

provider.notes: filled by PromptTemplateBuilder.buildComparisonPrompt() ({{context}} + {{question}}); union of prompt-templates.ts double-brace tokens declared (extra = WARN only)
